## touch-browser v0.1.13

- Realigned the Rust workspace version, MCP registry metadata, bridge implementation version, Docker install pin, and npm package version on `0.1.13`.
- Carries forward the MCP tool catalog quality improvements so the published npm package and GitHub release assets describe the same tool surface.
- Prepares the Glama rescan path to evaluate a fully aligned `0.1.13` release chain end-to-end.
